dialogos.texto_en: Ahh, I played so much!
I can't move anymore...
It's easy to forget,\nbut playing in the ocean uses up a lot of energy.
We went snorkeling, swam a lot,\nplayed with a beach ball...\nWhat a fulfilling day!
Absolutely. We enjoyed it to the fullest!
But, I can still play more!
That's just you, though.
Well, the sun will set soon,\nso should we pack up and head back?
Um, wait a minute.\nI have a suggestion.
Hm? What?
Why don't we just stay here until sunset?\nWith today's weather,\nI think we can see a beautiful one.
Oh, that's a great idea, let's do it!
Yeah, there's no rush to leave, anyway.
Yes!\nI'm sure it will be beautiful.\nIf we all watch it together, it will be a great memory%p-2;――
No no, this is definitely a time\nfor just the two of you.
Why is that?
Why?\nBecause watching the sunset on the beach\nis quite a romantic situation, you know?
Sounds like a time for lovers,\nno matter how you see it.
B-but...
What about you, Futaro?\nDon't you want to watch it just with Itsuki?
(Watching the sunset with everyone\n would definitely be wonderful, but%p-2;――%p;)
I'd like to watch it together with Itsuki.
Uesugi-kun...
And besides, once you guys have made up your mind,\nthere's no changing it, right?
Yeah. You understand us well.
It's been around you guys a long time. \nI've figured that much out.
And Itsuki, how do you feel?
I also...want to be with you...
Great, great. I'm glad you're so honest.
So, how about you two change your clothes,\nand take a stroll to Sunset Beach?
Sunset Beach?
It's a beach just like this one,\nwhere you can see a gorgeous sunset.\nIt's not too far if we walk along the coast.
That's the one.
Or, we could go there instead if you want.
Nah, walking along the coast sounds nice.\nWhat do you think, Itsuki?
Yes, let's do that.
Okay, then let's meet back at the hotel\nafter watching the sunset!
Yeah.
Don't get too caught up in your own little world\nand forget to come back, 'kay?
D-don't worry!\nWe'll be back before dinner!
